signIn.headline: Read once. Ask anything.
signIn.subhead: A private notebook for everything in your inbox.
signIn.errorTryAgain: Sign-in didn't go through. Please try again.
signIn.microcopy: No card required. 2-minute setup. Your data stays in your Drive.

feed.title: Inbox
feed.empty: We're watching for your first email.

subjects.navEmpty: No subjects yet — we'll add one when your first watched email arrives.
subjects.detailEmpty: No items in this subject yet.
subjects.itemCountWithUnread: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}, {unread} unread

ask.title: Ask {subject}
ask.subtitle: Grounded in this subject only. We refuse what we can't ground.
ask.sourcesEmpty: No items in this subject yet — we need at least one summarized email before we can answer.
ask.sourcesNote: All items in this subject are searched. Per-item exclusion ships in the next update.
ask.errorNotConfigured: Ask isn't connected yet. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_RAG_BASE_URL in your environment.
ask.errorNotSignedIn: You need to be signed in to ask.
ask.errorGeneric: We couldn't reach the assistant. Please try again.

askLanding.title: Ask anything in your inbox.
askLanding.body: Pick a subject from the sidebar and tap Ask this subject to start. Cross-subject and global Ask are coming soon.
askLanding.hint: Answers are grounded only in the subject you choose. We refuse what we can't ground.

markdown.empty: This email has no markdown summary yet.
markdown.driveNotReady: This summary lives in your Drive folder. Drive support is coming soon.
markdown.error: We couldn't load this summary. Please try again.

inbox.label: Inbox
inbox.helpText: Where Shomery is reading from, and when the last summary landed.
inbox.firstSummaryWaiting: Watching — your first summary will land here soon.
inbox.pendingBody: We're connecting Gmail watching for your account. Once it's wired, your sender will show here.

watchedSenders.label: Watched senders
watchedSenders.helpText: We summarize emails from these senders or domains. Use a full address (alice@example.com) or a domain (@acme.com).
watchedSenders.empty: No watched senders yet. Add one below.
watchedSenders.saveError: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

validation.tooLong: Each entry must be 255 characters or fewer.
validation.invalidFormat: Use an email address or a domain like acme.com or @acme.com.
validation.listFull: You can watch up to 200 senders or domains.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.helpText: Pick where Shomery sends you new summaries.
notifications.saveError: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
notifications.telegramRequiresChatId: Add a Telegram chat ID to enable this channel.

emailDigest.label: Email digest
emailDigest.helpText: A daily roundup of new summaries to your account email.

whereToSave.label: Where to save
whereToSave.helpText: Where Shomery stores your summaries today, and what's next.
whereToSave.storage: Every summary is saved as a markdown file in your private Shomery vault — Firebase Storage, scoped to your account. Only you can read it.
whereToSave.drive: Google Drive support is in review. Once verification clears, a Drive folder picker will appear here and new summaries will save straight to your Drive.

groups.label: Subject groups
groups.helpText: Bundle related subjects under a parent name. Emails stay where they are — groups are just a way to view them together.
groups.empty: You don't have any groups yet. Create one to bundle related subjects.
groups.memberCount: {count, plural, =0 {no subjects} one {# subject} other {# subjects}}
groups.membersHelp: Pick which subjects belong to this group. A subject can only be in one group at a time.
groups.noSubjectsAvailable: No subjects yet. Once you have a few, come back to bundle them.
groups.confirmDeletePrompt: Type {name} to delete this group. The subjects inside it stay — only the group is removed.
groups.saveError: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

privacy.label: Privacy & data
privacy.helpText: Take your data with you, or remove it from Shomery for good.

export.title: Export my data
export.body: Download a JSON file with your account, settings, and every summary Shomery has stored for you.
export.error: We couldn't build your export. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.body: Removes your sign-in, settings, and every summary. This cannot be undone.
delete.error: We couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

welcome.headline: Welcome to Shomery.
welcome.body: We'll watch the senders you choose, summarize what arrives, and answer questions grounded in your own inbox.

connect.title: Your inbox is connected.
connect.body: We use the Google account you signed in with to read emails as they arrive. Nothing leaves your account uninvited.
connect.pendingBody: We're connecting Gmail watching for your account. Your first summary will land here shortly.
connect.firstSummaryWaiting: Watching — your first summary will land here soon.

watch.title: Who should we watch?
watch.body: Add the senders or domains worth summarizing. You can change this anytime in Settings.
watch.minRequired: Add at least one sender or domain to continue.
watch.saveError: We couldn't save your list. Please try again.

save.title: Where summaries live.
save.storage: Every email Shomery summarizes is saved as a markdown file in your private Shomery vault — Firebase Storage, scoped to your account. Only you can read it.
save.drive: Google Drive support is in review. Until verification clears, the system can't write to your Drive. Once it does, a Drive folder picker will appear here, and new summaries will save straight to your Drive.
save.completeError: We couldn't finish setup. Please try again.
